profile.bio: I am an architect of digital experiences, bridging the gap between raw computational capability and intuitive human interface. My work centers on designing systems that are robust, scalable, and inherently beautiful.

All: SYSTEM CORES ONLINE: Vellore Institute of Technology (CSE with AI & Robotics)
LANGUAGES : Python, Go, C++, C, JavaScript, SQL, NoSQL
WEB TECH  : Next.js, React.js, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
DEVOPS/OPS: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, Azure, GCP
CONCEPTS  : DSA, OOPS, Operating Systems, Networking, AI, Kafka, Cadence
Frontend: - JavaScript & TypeScript, HTML/CSS, UI/UX performance optimization
Backend: - Languages: Go (robust concurrency), Python (AI pipelines), Node.js, Java
- APIs & Orchestration: REST APIs, GraphQL, Kafka, Cadence workflows
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Oracle SQL
Systems: - Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD automation pipelines
- Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Azure, GCP
- Low Level: OS kernel tweaks, EvolutionX custom ROM optimizations

careerTimeline.description: Architected end-to-end Gen AI report pipelines, Vega visualization servers, and LangFlow orchestration layers. Engineered high-timeout MCP server-client architectures, an internal SRE ticket agent system, the WebScroll anti-bot browser scraping infrastructure, and fine-tuned mT5-XL on 1.5M pairs for Japanese translation at scale.
Delivered a multi-tenant microservice notification system with <2% bounce rate. Reduced Google Calendar sync errors by >99.9% and built high-throughput Chatbot MCP servers processing 1M+ records.
Led MERN/Next.js corporate platform development with 3D elements (Three.js), boosting engagement by 25%. Deployed LLM sound detection & translation pipelines. Trained 10+ junior developers.
